compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: DECISION: DROP. WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE was already removed from code by an earlier config refactor — _display_mode (lookups.py:65) now resolves purely via load_config().ticket.display_mode with no env precedence. Only a docstring comment remained; scrubbed it. grep WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE src/ = CLEAN. ticket.display_mode resolution is covered by existing config tests (full suite green, no regression); no new test needed since there is no new behavior.

compiled_state.description:
## What
WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE is the only LIVE DSO-named env var: src/rebar/_engine_support/lookups.py:67 (_display_mode) checks it BEFORE REBAR_CONFIG. It is a legacy config-file env name from the DSO era.

## Decision needed (record in a comment before implementing)
(a) drop it entirely (clean; breaks anyone still exporting it), (b) rename to REBAR_CONFIG_FILE with a deprecation alias, or (c) keep as-is. Recommend (b) or (a).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Decision recorded as a comment
- [ ] src/rebar/_engine_support/lookups.py updated accordingly (precedence: REBAR_CONFIG -> .rebar/config.conf -> .rebar.conf)
- [ ] Test added/updated for ticket.display_mode resolution (no regression)
- [ ] grep for WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE in src/ returns nothing (or only the renamed alias)
compiled_state.title: WU-1: resolve WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE back-compat (the only functional change)
